description: Comprehensive request body verification: dict-typed dynamic instruction, REPL globals injection, variable persistence, worker result chaining, combined data sources, functionResponse fidelity, worker systemInstruction/generationConfig, and dynamic instruction re-injection across iterations.

initial_repl_globals._repo_xml_data: «REPO_XML_START» <repository name="test-repo"><file path="main.py">print('hello world')</file><file path="utils.py">def add(a,b): return a+b</file></repository> «REPO_XML_END»

responses.note: Reasoning iter 1: reads _repo_xml_data (REPL global string, simulating pack_repo output), reads _test_metadata (REPL global dict), combines both into llm_query prompt. Tests G4 (combined sources) and G5 (REPL globals injection).

args.code:
repo_xml = _repo_xml_data
metadata = _test_metadata
combined_prompt = "«COMBINED_PROMPT_START» Analyze this repository:\n" + repo_xml + "\n\nWith metadata: " + str(metadata) + " «COMBINED_PROMPT_END»"
result = llm_query(combined_prompt)
print(result)
print("«STDOUT_SENTINEL_START» stdout from iteration 1 «STDOUT_SENTINEL_END»")

responses.note: Worker 1: receives combined prompt with repo XML and metadata dict. Returns analysis with markers.

parts.text: «WORKER_RESPONSE_1_START» The repository contains a simple Python project with main.py entry point and utils.py helper module providing arithmetic operations «WORKER_RESPONSE_1_END»

responses.note: Reasoning iter 2: uses persisted repo_xml and result from iter 1. Chains worker result into next llm_query. Tests G2 (persistence) and G3 (chaining).

args.code:
prior_analysis = result
synthesis_prompt = "«CHAINED_PROMPT_START» Synthesize based on prior analysis:
" + prior_analysis + "

Original repo:
" + repo_xml + "

Metadata: " + str(metadata) + " «CHAINED_PROMPT_END»"
final_result = llm_query(synthesis_prompt)
print(final_result)
print("«STDOUT_SENTINEL_2_START» stdout from iteration 2 «STDOUT_SENTINEL_2_END»")

responses.note: Worker 2: receives chained prompt with prior worker result + repo XML + metadata. Returns synthesis.

parts.text: «WORKER_RESPONSE_2_START» Synthesis complete: the codebase is a minimal Python utility project with arithmetic helpers and a main entry point version 1.0.0 «WORKER_RESPONSE_2_END»

responses.note: Reasoning iter 3: sees worker 2 result in functionResponse, emits final answer. Tests G6 (variables dict) and G9 (dynamic instruction re-injection).

parts.text:
Analysis and synthesis complete.

FINAL(«FINAL_ANSWER_START» Comprehensive analysis: minimal Python utility project with arithmetic helpers, main entry point, metadata version 1.0.0 «FINAL_ANSWER_END»)
